info.english_meaning: to speak to tell to state to explain to narrate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yAvanniHSreyasaM vAkyaM kiYcit prakaTayAmyaham' (rA॰5.1.93) prakaTayAmyuccArayAmItyarTaH atra praSabdaH saNkoce paricCede vartate DAtvarTaM vAkyaprabanDamuktimAtre paryavasAyayati
'tvayA saNkaTyamAnena mahimnA sAtvatAM pate nAtitfpyati me cittam …' (BA॰pu॰8.5.13).. saNkaTyamAnena=saNkIrtyamAnena=upavarRyamAnena=aBizwUyamAnena
'devamivAcAryamupAsItA'vikaTayan' (Apa0 Da0 12613) avikaTayan=vyarTAM kaTAmakurvan kaTAdiByazWaka (44102) sUtre vikaTeti paWyate vyarTA kaTA vikaTA vikaTAyAM sADuH pravIRo vEkaTikaH
'yataH kAvyasya praBedA muktakaM…paryAyabanDaH parikaTA… ityevamAdayaH' (DvanyA0 37 vyAKyAyAm) DarmAdipuruzArTAnyatamADikaraRakaH kaTAsaNgrahaH parikaTA
